final:
module phase_detector (
    input wire obf_A,
    input wire B,
    output wire lead,
    output wire lag,
    output wire in_phase
);
    assign lead = (obf_A & ~B);         // obf_A leads B when obf_A is high and B is low
    assign lag = (~obf_A & B);          // obf_A lags B when obf_A is low and B is high
    assign in_phase = (obf_A == B);     // Both signals are in phase when they are equal
endmodule
